Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend
Off Calendar Jan-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Stephen C. Franz of the law offices of Lathrop & Gage LLP (310.789.4632) appears via telephone as counsel for defendant/opposing party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF JORDAN NIKO Motion To Amend, for leave to file his proposed first amended complaint is GRANTED and the trial date of June 5, 2017 is vacated. Granting the motion is supported by the policy of great liberality of allowing amendments to pleadings and, once the trial date is vacated, the absence of any discernable prejudice to defendant RD/Jet LLC. That the case against RD is enlarged and its exposure is now greater than before is not the kind of prejudice that warrants denial of a motion to amend where there is ample time to defend against the new allegations and claims. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)
